title: funcy's Villager Names
description: A spigot plugin that adds names to Minecraft villagers, with customizatized settings!
body:
![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b42c2f572075e1e880003a7c07caa26dc2a63faa_0.webp)

funcy's villager names adds random names to minecraft villagers! It would give custom names to minecraft villagers, and will be automatically applied to an unnamed villager wheb it is detected!

## Showcase:

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d353430aed5775b6a1e2a1aedfb06f063464e547.png)

## 100% Configuable 
![config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2a203d62794d5b39abd663f22178f1fb19c7acd.png)

You can also give villagers colors in their name!
